form.formComment: Racing well. Last run finished second in a small field at Wincanton on March 23 over 5000m, 23 len behind Taxus Baccata carrying 66.5kg at $3.30. Before that finished third in a small field at this track on February 13 over 4200m, on slow going 17 len behind Kalista Love carrying 71kg at $4. Likely to play a major role.

form.formComment: Racing well. Last run finished fourth in a small field at Southwell on April 1 over 4100m, 21 len behind Ukantango carrying 69.5kg at $7. Start before finished third of 8 runners at Newcastle on March 3 over 4000m, 2.75 len behind Hawkseye View carrying 74.5kg at $15. Has been racing well. Hard to fault on her best jumps form.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last outing finished second in a small field at Exeter on March 22 over 4800m, 10 len behind Sweet Nightingale with 75.5kg at $2.80. Before that led throughout and just faded finished second of 7 starters at Leicester on February 12 over 4500m, on rain affected going; 1.75 len behind Fay Ce Que Voudras with 76kg at $3. Capable of better showing. Strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after two months won by 2.75 len this track on April 6 over 4700m defeating Best Women carrying 61kg at $3.50 in a hurdle. Previously second-up finished fourth in a small field at this track on October 29 over 4200m, 22 len behind Fancy Stuff with 63kg at $34. Fitter and expected to go on with it.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Last run finished fifth of 7 starters at Plumpton on March 16 over 5100m, 63 len behind Ferret Jeeter with 65.5kg at $23. At only start last preparation didn't finish the race at this track on October 29 over 4800m. Others better placed in this one.
